news.t: First Trust ETF Introduces Its First Bitcoin Strategy ETFs

overview.description: The FT Vest Bitcoin Strategy Floor15 ETF April (BFAP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund that seeks to provide capped gains on the spot price of bitcoin, while attempting to hedge declines greater than 15% during a one year period starting April. The fund uses FLEX options to construct the exposure. BFAP was launched on Apr 3, 2025 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust ETF Introduces Its First Bitcoin Strategy ETFs
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust”) a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider and asset manager, announced that it has launched two new bitcoin strategy ETF...
